programmes.show_description: Execution: Series three of the classic World War II drama set in occupied Belgium. As the war draws to a close, Monique and Madeleine make the most important decisions of their lives.
Ambush: Series three of the classic World War II drama set in occupied Belgium. A convoy of rocket parts exposes Lifeline to sabotage, and Bradley makes his first mistake.
Just Light the Blue Touch Paper: Third series of the edgy World War II drama. It is finally time for Bradley to use his army of evaders to act against the V2 weapons.
Sound of Thunder: Third series of the edge-of-the-seat World War II drama. The Allied advance threatens to spark reprisals against the Lifeline collaborators.
Collaborator: World War II drama series set in occupied Belgium. As Albert is released, he is faced with his communist enemies, who see him as a collaborator.
A biker riding without a helmet crashes and the team launch a desperate fight to save his life as his horrified family look on. A man barricades himself into a canal boat.
Shopping from Home.
A Lamborghini supercar crashes and bursts into flames, leaving two passengers with serious injuries. Also, a patient requiring urgent care leaves the team with an outsized problem.
A car being pursued by police crashes and HART are called to treat a passenger trapped in her seat with serious injuries. Meanwhile, floodwaters swamp a Yorkshire town.
A horse rider is hit by a car on a country road, leaving both her and her horse with serious injuries. Plus, the centre of Leeds is locked down after a suspicious package is found.

programmes.show_name: Doctor Who: Invasion of the Dinosaurs
programmes.show_description: Captured as looters, the Doctor and Sarah Jane struggle to convince UNIT of the dinosaur threat while the true conspirators work to maintain the chaos.

programmes.show_name: Doctor Who: Invasion of the Dinosaurs
programmes.show_description: The Doctor investigates the temporal distortions causing the dinosaurs, uncovering clues that point to an organised and technologically advanced plot.

programmes.show_name: Doctor Who: Invasion of the Dinosaurs
programmes.show_description: Sarah Jane is abducted and taken aboard a spaceship, where she is told of a radical plan to rebuild Earth's past.

programmes.show_name: Doctor Who: Invasion of the Dinosaurs
programmes.show_description: As the Doctor closes in on the scientists creating the time distortions, Sarah Jane fights to reveal the truth behind the fake space mission.

programmes.show_name: Doctor Who: Invasion of the Dinosaurs
programmes.show_description: The Doctor attempts to thwart the Operation Golden Age conspiracy and stop the time reversal in an effort to restore peace.

Gaz and Lee blue light to a lady who's been involved in an incident with a bin lorry, while Simone and Claire are called to a pensioner who has fallen in her bedroom.
Ann and Steve are called to help a woman and it becomes clear she's having a heart attack and needs surgery. Stuart and Craig treat a woman who may be having an allergic reaction.
Sam and Joel help a man who is struggling to cope having found out he's been exposed to HIV, while Nic and Carla visit a lady who has a painful infected foot following surgery.

It's a Knockout: An evening of dressing up in old 'It's A Knockout' costumes coincides with the arrival of Terry's company chairman for dinner. Laughs with the charming couple.
Friends and Neighbours: Laughs galore in the suburban sitcom we all grew up on. The Medfords end up at each other's throats when they try to solve other people's problems.
June's Holiday Weekend: A supposedly restful weekend at nephew Alan's country pub leaves the couple anxious to get home.
In Sickness and in Health: Sitcom gold with the Medfords. Terry and June are looking forward to a weekend away, until Terry falls ill.
A Piece of the Action: The duo win a giant jigsaw, which proves to be a dangerous pastime, especially when a vital piece goes missing.
Snookered: Deciding to sell his old snooker table, Terry places an advertisement in the local paper. Confusion over phone numbers sends the couple on a fortune-hunting trail.
